title: Formatting decimal in formula
excerpt:
Hi, 
I’m currently working in old monday instance and the numbers format that show in the formula colum are  showing the decimals with a coma. 
For example 125,25 
How can I change the format so the decimals are shown wi…

posts.author: Gabo (Gabriel Braun)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m currently working in old monday instance and the numbers format that show in the formula colum are showing the decimals with a coma.
For example 125,25
How can I change the format so the decimals are shown with a period
For example 125.25

Thanks in advance

posts.author: okennis (Olivia Kennis)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Gabo – Olivia here from monday.com. You should be able to adjust the formatting in the numbers column or formula column. The decimal will inherit the format of the numbers column(s) or the way the formula was written. Hope this helps! If you need further assistance, please feel free to shoot a note to support@monday.com to help you troubleshoot further. Thanks!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
